message:
test(proptest): add property tests for lock_orchestration, disaster_recovery_drills, dependency_eradication

- proptest_lock_orchestration.rs: 42 property tests covering serde roundtrips,
  ResourceId invariants, LockEntry expiry logic, acquire/release/group semantics,
  handoff protocol, telemetry consistency, and snapshot diagnostics

- proptest_disaster_recovery_drills.rs: 40 property tests covering RTO/RPO target
  evaluation, DrillVerdict algebra (commutativity, dominance), DrillMetrics
  arithmetic, DrillRunner execution invariants, and ContinuityReport aggregation

- proptest_dependency_eradication.rs: 42 property tests covering ViolationSeverity
  ordering, ScanReport verdict logic, RegressionGuardSet invariants,
  SurfaceContractStatus arithmetic, MigrationReport cutover readiness,
  and standard forbidden patterns validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
